MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Dina Komin, is present. Represented by Paul Zinchik
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Anjelle Louie , is present.
Attorney, Noelle Formosa , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-06-2010 is vacated.
